results.description: saf/ public function return types depend on crate extensibility: if spi/ exists, return `impl Trait` for downstream polymorphism; if spi/ does not exist, return concrete types only (no trait leaks)

violations.message: saf/ pub fn returns `-> impl MessageBroker` where `MessageBroker` is a local trait — not allowed
violations.expected: Make trait pub(crate) and compose operations inside the facade instead
violations.fix_hint: Change `pub trait MessageBroker` to `pub(crate) trait MessageBroker` and remove this pub fn returning it

violations.message: saf/ pub fn returns `-> impl TaskQueue` where `TaskQueue` is a local trait — not allowed
violations.expected: Make trait pub(crate) and compose operations inside the facade instead
violations.fix_hint: Change `pub trait TaskQueue` to `pub(crate) trait TaskQueue` and remove this pub fn returning it

results.description: saf/ methods must not be thin wrappers — a saf/ method whose entire body delegates to a free function or another method adds no value and signals incomplete consolidation

violations.message: saf/ method `create_config_builder` is a thin wrapper around `ConfigLoaderFactory::create_config_builder` — inline the logic or delete the free function
violations.expected: Move the body of the delegated function directly into this method
violations.fix_hint: Copy the body of `ConfigLoaderFactory::create_config_builder` into `create_config_builder`, then delete `ConfigLoaderFactory::create_config_builder`

violations.message: saf/ method `in_memory` is a thin wrapper around `InMemoryMessageBroker::new` — inline the logic or delete the free function
violations.expected: Move the body of the delegated function directly into this method
violations.fix_hint: Copy the body of `InMemoryMessageBroker::new` into `in_memory`, then delete `InMemoryMessageBroker::new`

violations.message: saf/ method `in_memory` is a thin wrapper around `InMemoryTaskQueue::new` — inline the logic or delete the free function
violations.expected: Move the body of the delegated function directly into this method
violations.fix_hint: Copy the body of `InMemoryTaskQueue::new` into `in_memory`, then delete `InMemoryTaskQueue::new`
